languages.text: "Когда полезли твари, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}губернатор-полковник Куравич{/d} лично осуществлял доставку священных механизмов красным мантиям. У них часовня машинных духов на северо-востоке".

"When those things appeared, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}Colonel-Governor Kuravich{/d} was personally handling the delivery of the sacred mechanisms to the red robes. Their machine spirit chapel is located in the north-east."
languages.original_text: "Когда полезли твари, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}губернатор-полковник Куравич{/d} лично осуществлял доставку священных механизмов красным мантиям. У них часовня машинных духов на северо-востоке".

traits.locale_text: "When those things appeared, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}Colonel-Governor Kuravich{/d} was personally handling the delivery of the sacred mechanisms to the red robes. Their machine spirit chapel is located in the north-east."
"When those things appeared, Colonel-Governor Kuravich was personally handling the delivery of the sacred mechanisms to the red robes. Their machine spirit chapel is located in the north-east."
"When those things came, he personally handled the delivery of the cogs' sacred mechanisms to their north-eastern distribution hub for some kind of forces there."
"When those things came, Colonel-Governor Kuravich personally handled the delivery of the sacred mechanisms to the red robes. Their machine spirit chapel is located in the north-east."
"When those things appeared, Colonel-Governor Kuravich was personally handling the delivery of the sacred mechanisms to the red robes. Their machine spirit chapel is located in the north-east."

languages.text: 「歯車たちの聖なる機構を、彼自身で、北東の拠点に運んだ。何か、その拠点に、力が必要だったのだ」
languages.original_text: "When those things came, he personally handled the delivery of the cogs' sacred mechanisms to their north-eastern distribution hub for some kind of forces there."

traits.locale_text: 「歯車たちの聖なる機構を、彼自身で、北東の拠点に運んだ。何か、その拠点に、力が必要だったのだ。」

languages.text: «Cuando llegaron esas cosas, el {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}coronel-gobernador Kuravich{/d} estaba supervisando personalmente la entrega de los mecanismos sagrados a los túnicas rojas. Su capilla de espíritus máquina está al nordeste».
languages.original_text: "When those things appeared, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}Colonel-Governor Kuravich{/d} was personally handling the delivery of the sacred mechanisms to the red robes. Their machine spirit chapel is located in the north-east."

traits.locale_text: «Cuando llegaron esas cosas, el {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}coronel-gobernador Kuravich{/d} estaba supervisando personalmente la entrega de los mecanismos sagrados a los túnicas rojas. Su capilla de espíritus máquina está al nordeste».

languages.text: "Als diese Dinger kamen, hat sich {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}Colonel-Gouverneur Kuravich{/d} selbst um die Ausgabe der heiligen Mechanismen an die Roten Roben gekümmert. Ihre Maschinengeistkapelle ist im Nordosten."
languages.original_text: "When those things appeared, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}Colonel-Governor Kuravich{/d} was personally handling the delivery of the sacred mechanisms to the red robes. Their machine spirit chapel is located in the north-east."

traits.locale_text: "Als diese Dinger kamen, hat sich Colonel-Gouverneur Kuravich selbst um die Ausgabe der heiligen Mechanismen an die Roten Roben gekümmert. Ihre Maschinengeistkapelle ist im Nordosten."

languages.text: « Quand ces créatures ont débarqué, le {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}colonel-gouverneur Kuravich{/d} était en train de livrer des mécanismes sacrés aux robes rouges. Leur chapelle se trouve au nord-est. »
languages.original_text: "When those things appeared, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}Colonel-Governor Kuravich{/d} was personally handling the delivery of the sacred mechanisms to the red robes. Their machine spirit chapel is located in the north-east."

traits.locale_text: « Quand ces créatures ont débarqué, le {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}colonel-gouverneur Kuravich{/d} était en train de livrer des mécanismes sacrés aux robes rouges. Leur chapelle se trouve au nord-est. »

languages.text: “那些东西出现的时候，总督上校{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}库拉维奇{/d}正亲自护送神圣机械，要将其移交给红袍们。他们的机魂圣堂就在东北方向。”
languages.original_text: "When those things appeared, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}Colonel-Governor Kuravich{/d} was personally handling the delivery of the sacred mechanisms to the red robes. Their machine spirit chapel is located in the north-east."

traits.locale_text: “那些东西出现的时候，总督上校{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}库拉维奇{/d}正亲自护送神圣机械，要将其移交给红袍们。他们的机魂圣堂就在东北方向。”

languages.text: "O şeyler ortaya çıktığında {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}Vali Albay Kuravich{/d}, kutsal mekanizmaların kırmızı cübbelilere teslimatını bizzat yürütüyordu. Makine ruhu şapelleri kuzeydoğuda bulunuyor."
languages.original_text: "When those things appeared, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}Colonel-Governor Kuravich{/d} was personally handling the delivery of the sacred mechanisms to the red robes. Their machine spirit chapel is located in the north-east."

traits.locale_text: "O şeyler ortaya çıktığında {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}Vali Albay Kuravich{/d}, kutsal mekanizmaların kırmızı cübbelilere teslimatını bizzat yürütüyordu. Makine ruhu şapelleri kuzeydoğuda bulunuyor."
